headline: Thousands Evacuated in Hawaii Due to Worst Flooding in 20 Years
tldr: Over 230 people rescued as authorities evacuate areas due to severe flooding, marking the worst such event in two decades.
key_points: Hawaii facing its worst flooding in 20 years
More than 230 people rescued so far
losers: People affected by the flooding, including those displaced from their homes
why_it_matters: Humanitarian efforts underway to support those affected
for_you: Stay tuned for updates on the situation and follow evacuation instructions from local authorities.
contrarian_view: Some argue that the flooding is a symptom of climate change, highlighting the need for sustainable solutions.

video_script.hook: Breaking news: Severe flooding hits Hawaii
body: The state of Hawaii is facing its worst flooding in two decades
Thousands of people have been evacuated from affected areas
video_script.closing: We'll continue to bring you updates on this developing story
